tasks.subject: Task 1: Database Migration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the `event` table and alter `time_block` and `deferred_item` tables.

**Files:**
- Create: `backend/src/main/resources/db/migration/V8__create_event.sql`

**Verify:** `cd backend && mvn test` → all existing tests still pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/src/main/resources/db/migration/V8__create_event.sql"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && mvn test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["event table created", "time_block.event_id FK added", "check constraint enforces exactly one of task_id/event_id", "deferred_item.resolved_event_id added"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Event Entity, Repository, DTOs, and Service
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the Event JPA entity, repository, request/response DTOs, and service with CRUD operations.

**Verify:** `cd backend && mvn test -Dtest="EventServiceTest"` → all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/event/Event.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/event/EventRepository.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/event/dto/EventCreateRequest.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/event/dto/EventUpdateRequest.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/event/dto/EventResponse.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/event/EventService.java", "backend/src/test/java/com/echel/planner/backend/event/EventServiceTest.java"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && mvn test -Dtest=EventServiceTest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Event entity maps all migration columns", "Repository queries for ownership and date-based lookup", "Service CRUD with ownership checks and validation", "Unit tests cover success and error paths"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Event Controller
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create REST endpoints for Event CRUD and add exception handling.

**Verify:** `cd backend && mvn test -Dtest="EventControllerIntegrationTest"` → all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/event/EventController.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/event/EventExceptionHandler.java", "backend/src/test/java/com/echel/planner/backend/event/EventControllerIntegrationTest.java"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && mvn test -Dtest=EventControllerIntegrationTest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All 5 CRUD endpoints work", "404 for unknown events", "400 for validation errors", "Integration tests cover success and error paths"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Deferred Item Conversion to Event
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add convert-to-event endpoint on deferred items.

**Verify:** `cd backend && mvn test -Dtest="DeferredItemConvertToEventTest"` → all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/deferred/dto/ConvertToEventRequest.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/deferred/DeferredItem.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/deferred/DeferredItemService.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/deferred/DeferredItemController.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/deferred/dto/DeferredItemResponse.java"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && mvn test -Dtest=DeferredItemConvertToEventTest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["convert-to-event endpoint creates Event and marks deferred item processed", "DeferredItemResponse includes resolvedEventId"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: TimeBlock Entity Changes and Schedule Service Updates
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add event relationship to TimeBlock, update schedule service to materialize events at plan time.

**Verify:** `cd backend && mvn test` → all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/schedule/TimeBlock.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/schedule/TimeBlockRepository.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/schedule/dto/TimeBlockResponse.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/schedule/ScheduleService.java"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && mvn test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TimeBlock has event ManyToOne", "TimeBlockResponse includes EventSummary", "savePlan materializes events", "savePlan validates no overlaps with events", "Session methods reject event blocks"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Admin Event CRUD (Backend)
tasks.description:

**Verify:** `cd backend && mvn test -Dtest="AdminEvent*"` → all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/admin/AdminEventController.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/admin/AdminEventService.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/admin/dto/AdminEventRequest.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/admin/dto/AdminEventResponse.java"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && mvn test -Dtest=AdminEvent*", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Standard admin CRUD at /api/v1/admin/events", "Tests follow existing patterns"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Frontend API Layer
tasks.description:

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npm run lint` → no errors

{"files": ["frontend/src/api/events.js", "frontend/src/api/deferred.js", "frontend/src/api/admin.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Event CRUD API functions exported", "convertDeferredToEvent added", "Admin event CRUD functions added"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Convert to Event Form (Frontend)

**Goal:** Add Convert to Event button and form to deferred items.

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npm run lint` → no errors

{"files": ["frontend/src/components/deferred/ConvertToEventForm.jsx", "frontend/src/components/deferred/DeferredItemActions.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Convert to Event button alongside Convert to Task", "Form has project, title, date, start/end time, energy level fields", "Successful conversion marks item processed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Schedule Grid Event Support (Frontend)
tasks.description:

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npm run lint` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/pages/start-day/EventBlock.jsx", "frontend/src/pages/start-day/pushBlocks.js", "frontend/src/pages/start-day/TimeBlockGrid.jsx", "frontend/src/pages/StartDayPage.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Events auto-loaded and rendered", "Event blocks visually distinct", "pushBlocks rejects overlaps with events", "savePlan sends only task blocks"]}
```
